title: Work to relaunch USMLE Step 2 CS discontinued
citation: USMLE. Work to relaunch USMLE Step 2 CS discontinued. Posted January 26, 2021. Accessed 2026-05-03.
permitted_uses: Historical context for Step 2 CS discontinuation and the need for innovative clinical-skills assessment approaches.
claims_supported: USMLE announced discontinuation of work to relaunch a modified Step 2 CS in January 2021.
USMLE stated it intended to work with medical education and medical board communities on innovative ways to assess clinical skills.
